title: Response Time by Zone
summary: Target response times for hotel-room and mobile-unit dispatch, by tourist zone.

items.title: Central Hurghada
items.body: Hotel-room dispatch target: 30–45 min from notification. Six on-zone clinics.

items.title: Sahl Hasheesh
items.body: Hotel-room dispatch target: 30–45 min. Three on-zone clinics; resort-gate access in place.

items.title: Safaga / Soma Bay
items.body: Dispatch target: 45–60 min via Soma Bay Clinic and northern transport.

items.title: Marsa Alam (extended)
items.body: On-call physician with remote-triage protocol; semi-ambulance transport when imaging or extended care is needed.
